payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Vertical wall-mounted picture frame with a narrow gold-tone wooden or metallic frame and white mat surrounding an indistinct, blurry image; the crop is edge-cut (partial) with slight glass reflection, photographed from approximately 1.2 meters away.

message.content: {"label":"picture frame","short_description":"narrow gold-tone vertical frame edge-crop","long_description":"Vertical wall-mounted picture frame with a narrow gold-tone wooden or metallic frame and white mat surrounding an indistinct, blurry image; the crop is edge-cut (partial) with slight glass reflection, photographed from approximately 1.2 meters away.","attributes":["narrow gold-tone frame","white mat","vertical orientation","blurry/indistinct artwork","partial/edge-cropped","slight glass reflection","wall-mounted"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.2}
